5:"$Sreact.suspense"
0:{"rsc":["$","$1","c",{"children":[[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Cron Deployment"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Run Mnemosyne as a scheduled batch process for periodic memory tasks."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Use Cases"}],"\n",["$","ul",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Daily consolidation jobs"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Scheduled memory imports"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Periodic backups"}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":"Report generation"}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Crontab Example"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Edit crontab\ncrontab -e\n\n# Daily consolidation at 3 AM\n0 3 * * * /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-consolidate --db /data/mnemosyne.db\n\n# Hourly backup\n0 * * * * /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-backup --db /data/mnemosyne.db --dest /backups\n\n# Weekly report (Mondays at 9 AM)\n0 9 * * 1 /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-report --db /data/mnemosyne.db --email admin@example.com\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Script"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-consolidate\n\nimport argparse\nfrom mnemosyne import Memory\n\ndef main():\n  parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()\n  parser.add_argument(\"--db\", required=True)\n  args = parser.parse_args()\n\n  mem = Memory(db_path=args.db)\n  stats_before = mem.stats()\n\n  mem.sleep()  # Run consolidation\n\n  stats_after = mem.stats()\n  print(f\"Consolidated: {stats_after.consolidated_count - stats_before.consolidated_count}\")\n  print(f\"Evicted: {stats_after.evicted_count - stats_before.evicted_count}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n  main()\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Backup Script"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"#!/usr/bin/env python3\n# /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-backup\n\nimport argparse\nimport shutil\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\n\ndef main():\n  parser = argparse.ArgumentParser()\n  parser.add_argument(\"--db\", required=True)\n  parser.add_argument(\"--dest\", required=True)\n  args = parser.parse_args()\n\n  timestamp = datetime.now().strftime(\"%Y%m%d_%H%M%S\")\n  backup_name = f\"mnemosyne_{timestamp}.db\"\n  dest = Path(args.dest) / backup_name\n\n  shutil.copy2(args.db, dest)\n  print(f\"Backup created: {dest}\")\n\nif __name__ == \"__main__\":\n  main()\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Monitoring Cron Jobs"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Add to crontab\nMAILTO=admin@example.com\n\n# Or log to file\n0 3 * * * /usr/local/bin/mnemosyne-consolidate --db /data/mnemosyne.db >> /var/log/mnemosyne/consolidate.log 2>&1\n","language":"bash"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-success","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start gap-3","children":[["$","$L3",null,{"iconNode":[["path",{"d":"M21.801 10A10 10 0 1 1 17 3.335","key":"yps3ct"}],["path",{"d":"m9 11 3 3L22 4","key":"1pflzl"}]],"className":"lucide-circle-check-big shrink-0 mt-0.5","size":18}],["$","div",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"className":"block mb-1","children":"Cron Best Practice"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Use absolute paths for all commands and files. Cron runs with a minimal PATH. Test scripts manually before adding to crontab."}]}]]}]]}]}]],[["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/_next/static/chunks/01cqa6yk54poy.js","async":true}]],["$","$L4",null,{"children":["$","$5",null,{"name":"Next.MetadataOutlet","children":"$@6"}]}]]}],"isPartial":false,"staleTime":300,"varyParams":null,"buildId":"oXnWYqRleeeMBk7EtSUz7"}
